review_text: The theme summaries are helpful, but my saved reports took several minutes to appear on mobile after I created them on desktop.
I need to filter feedback by workspace on mobile. Right now I have to open the web app to check enterprise accounts.
I use the app before product standup to check yesterday's negative feedback. It is much faster than reading every ticket.
The app sends alerts for every imported row. I only want alerts for negative enterprise feedback.
Saved reports are easy to scan and the quote cards make leadership reviews less painful.
I pasted feedback into the import screen and my session expired before I could save the preview.
I take interview notes on flights and want to stage feedback offline, then sync when I reconnect.
Searching quotes inside feedback records is accurate and helps me find churn risks quickly.
